race.comment: CALEANA (7) finished sixth two runs back then did well last start but found a couple better over 1500m at Ballarat, beaten only a neck after being in contention on the bend. Ideally placed and is sure to take plenty of stopping. THE DAILY PLANET (5) was safely held when eighth last time out over 1760m at this track, beaten 6 lengths, after a win at this track at the previous outing. In the mix. SQUANDER (14) made progress last time out, finishing 2.25 lengths from the winner in second at the end of 1760m at this track. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot find winning ways. BELLONADO (4) didn't disgrace himself at the first run for the new camp in BM70 grade at Warrnambool during the carnival. Will find this much easier than, strips fitter and draws better than some key rivals.
